transactions.desc: The Dodgers optioned Mills to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Tuesday.
The Astros reinstated Pearson (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Tuesday.
The Astros optioned Whitcomb to Triple-A Sugar Land on Tuesday.
The Rockies optioned Thompson to Triple-A Albuquerque on Tuesday.
Meyers (oblique) was reinstated from the 10-day injured list and is starting in center field and batting seventh Tuesday against the Twins, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Rockies reinstated Freeman from the paternity list Tuesday.
Raley is not in the lineup Tuesday versus the White Sox.
The Diamondbacks selected Garcia's contract from Triple-A Reno on Tuesday.
The Blue Jays recalled Lee from Triple-A Buffalo on Tuesday.
The Cubs designated Blach for assignment Tuesday.
The Cubs activated Thielbar (hamstring) from the 15-day injured list Tuesday.
The Pirates recalled Garcia from Triple-A Indianapolis on Tuesday.
The Rangers optioned Collyer to Triple-A Round Rock on Tuesday.
The Rangers activated Martin (biceps) from the 15-day injured list Tuesday.
The Guardians recalled Heuer from Triple-A Columbus on Tuesday.
The Nationals recalled Chaparro from Triple-A Rochester on Tuesday.
The Nationals recalled Crews from Triple-A Rochester on Tuesday.
Wiemer (hand) was optioned to Triple-A Rochester on Tuesday.
The Mets selected Severino's contract from Triple-A Syracuse and optioned him to Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Mets recalled Morabito from Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday, Will Sammon of The Athletic reports.
The Twins recalled Adams from Triple-A St. Paul on Tuesday.
The Orioles designated Handley for assignment Tuesday.
The Orioles selected Suarez's contract from Triple-A Norfolk on Tuesday, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.
The Orioles optioned Foster to Triple-A Norfolk on Tuesday, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.
The Twins selected Jackson's contract from Triple-A St. Paul on Tuesday, Aaron Gleeman of AaronGleeman.com reports.
The Twins designated Topa for assignment Tuesday, Dan Hayes of The Athletic reports.
The Twins selected Arcia's contract from Triple-A St. Paul on Tuesday, Dan Hayes of The Athletic reports.
The Twins optioned Lewis to Triple-A St. Paul on Tuesday, Dan Hayes of The Athletic reports.
Atlanta recalled Mederos from Triple-A Gwinnett on Tuesday.
Atlanta released Bummer on Tuesday.
